evals.prompt: Please transcribe the handwritten notes in ~/Downloads/Notes and merge them.
evals.expected_output: The agent sequentially transcribes the images and creates Notes.md.

assertions.name: Sequential Transcription
assertions.description: The agent processes the images sequentially rather than in parallel.

assertions.name: Merges to Markdown
assertions.description: The agent merges the transcriptions into a markdown file.
